Description: A strange concoction beloved by persistent pots. Mortal consumption is ill-advised.
Notes gleaned from your encounter with the Garula prevalent on the Occult Crescent.
An illustration of a starship, clipped from <Emphasis>The Thavnairian Truth</Emphasis>. The picture has been “enhanced” with a hand-drawn portrait of Inspector Hildibrand.
A magicked piece of masonry found in the lost citadel.
A hunk of magicked stone uncovered in the Wanderer's Haven.
A sample of aether-imbued masonry discovered in the crystallized caverns.
A sizable stone chunk retrieved from the shadowed city. Exudes faint traces of aether.
Notes gleaned from your encounter with the flying lizards that inhabit the Occult Crescent.
Notes gleaned from your encounter with the bandersnatches found roaming the Occult Crescent.
Dried wivre excrement needed to create manure for farming.
A small sack filled to bursting with Gok Golma-grown vegetables.
A small sack filled with choice meats, the hunks carved by the Brethren of Br'aax from their beastly quarry.
A sack stuffed with the fragrant, fibrous stems of Ja Tiika bananas.
A compress infused with medicinal herbs to soothe pain, created by Anggir for the people of Mamook.
A heavy fruit harvested from a Gok Golma branchbearer.
An order of freshly harvested vegetables to be delivered to a waiting resident of Mamook.
